positive: A stylized geometric woodland scene. Focus on a large, majestic silhouette of a fox sitting elegantly within a grouping of abstract, stylized oak branches and ferns. The fox's tail and ears should be sharp and clean. Use a sophisticated, limited color palette of deep forest greens, muted burnt oranges, navy blue, and sepia tones. The background should be minimal and patterned with delicate repeating forest motifs. High contrast, vector-art style, linocut print aesthetic, clean lines, centered composition, perfect for apparel transfer printing.
negative: blur, low detail, text, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, bad hands, cropped, artifact, busy background, gradients, realistic photo, messy lines
